scenario_description: 用户在 VS Code 中逐步完善一份事故简报，先写摘要，再补救火动作，最后补跟进表格，考察 Agent 连续编辑同一 Markdown 文件的能力。

phases.instruction: 请新建 incident_brief.md。第一行写 # Incident Brief，第二行写 API latency increased after the deploy.。
在下面补一个二级标题 ## Immediate Actions，并写一个有序列表，内容依次是 Check error budget、Roll back the API pod、Monitor recovery。
最后再补一个二级标题 ## Follow-up，并插入一个两列表格。表头是 Owner 和 Task；两行内容分别是 SRE | Pull nginx logs，Support | Update status page。

result.command:
python -c "from pathlib import Path; p=Path('/home/user/Desktop/vscode_incident_brief_108/incident_brief.md'); expected='# Incident Brief
API latency increased after the deploy.
## Immediate Actions
1. Check error budget
2. Roll back the API pod
3. Monitor recovery
## Follow-up
| Owner | Task |
| --- | --- |
| SRE | Pull nginx logs |
| Support | Update status page |
'; print('PASS' if p.exists() and p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')==expected else 'FAIL')"
